app.name: Night Wardens Auto-GM
app.principle: Tarot does not predict the future. It defines reality. Investigate first, prepare second, confront last.

Blades.caseStyle: Hostile spirits, wraiths, ambushes, pursuit, open danger.
Blades.reversedRule: Violence is hidden, mistimed, misdirected, or unstable.

Blood.caseStyle: Witness work, trauma, bonds, personal stakes, family secrets.
Blood.reversedRule: Emotional truth is buried, twisted, or manipulated.

Relics.caseStyle: Creature hunts, relic recovery, caches, countermeasure problems.
Relics.reversedRule: Preparation fails, gear is flawed, or tools come with a cost.

Sigils.caseStyle: Demons, djinn, fae, cult activity, summoning, wards, threshold failure.
Sigils.reversedRule: Rituals misfire, structures break, or occult processes twist.

Queen.intensity: intelligent, manipulative, or emotionally central force

majorArcana.name: The Fool
majorArcana.upright: Open a hidden layer, new force, or second thread.
majorArcana.reversed: Wrong story; assumptions fail.

majorArcana.name: The Magician
majorArcana.upright: Add tools, leverage, or deliberate supernatural method.
majorArcana.reversed: Power destabilizes and turns unsafe.

majorArcana.name: The High Priestess
majorArcana.upright: Reveal the real nature of a threat or key secret.
majorArcana.reversed: False certainty or misleading evidence.

majorArcana.name: The Empress
majorArcana.upright: Spread influence, infestation, healing, or life-tied force.
majorArcana.reversed: Growth becomes corruption.

majorArcana.name: The Emperor
majorArcana.upright: A faction, hierarchy, or command structure intervenes.
majorArcana.reversed: Oppressive control or blocked access.

majorArcana.name: The Hierophant
majorArcana.upright: Divine law, sacred structure, or ritual order enters play.
majorArcana.reversed: Corrupted rite or rigid dogma harms the hunt.

majorArcana.name: The Lovers
majorArcana.upright: A relationship, pact, or tether defines the case.
majorArcana.reversed: Betrayal, fracture, or painful severance.

majorArcana.name: The Chariot
majorArcana.upright: Push the hunt forward fast; chase, pursuit, acceleration.
majorArcana.reversed: Loss of control; pace turns hostile.

majorArcana.name: Strength
majorArcana.upright: Gain control over fear, affliction, or pressure.
majorArcana.reversed: Self-control breaks; the threat gets inside.

majorArcana.name: The Hermit
majorArcana.upright: A solitary clue, witness, or hidden record becomes key.
majorArcana.reversed: Lose support; the team is cut off.

majorArcana.name: Wheel of Fortune
majorArcana.upright: Shift case direction, timing, or pressure track.
majorArcana.reversed: Bad timing or reversal hurts the team.

majorArcana.name: Justice
majorArcana.upright: Expose a lie, debt, or old wrong tied to the case.
majorArcana.reversed: False accusation or skewed judgment.

majorArcana.name: The Hanged Man
majorArcana.upright: Progress requires a real cost or delay.
majorArcana.reversed: Painful stall or wasted opportunity.

majorArcana.name: Death
majorArcana.upright: Threat changes form; one phase ends and another begins.
majorArcana.reversed: Mutation or unstable escalation.

majorArcana.name: Temperance
majorArcana.upright: Stabilize a scene, reduce pressure, or control mixed forces.
majorArcana.reversed: Imbalance doubles the danger.

majorArcana.name: The Devil
majorArcana.upright: Temptation, possession, affliction, or dark leverage grows.
majorArcana.reversed: A brief chance to resist, never free.

majorArcana.name: The Tower
majorArcana.upright: Trigger catastrophe, breach, or structural failure.
majorArcana.reversed: Collapse is delayed, building dread.

majorArcana.name: The Star
majorArcana.upright: A clue, recovery window, or moral center appears.
majorArcana.reversed: False hope comforts before it misleads.

majorArcana.name: The Moon
majorArcana.upright: Confusion, concealment, and false readings cloud the hunt.
majorArcana.reversed: The hidden thing is forced into view.

majorArcana.name: The Sun
majorArcana.upright: Expose truth, reveal the path, remove false leads.
majorArcana.reversed: Success arrives with a cost or arrogant mistake.

majorArcana.name: Judgment
majorArcana.upright: Force confrontation; reveal what must be answered.
majorArcana.reversed: Outcome is postponed, but pressure remains.

majorArcana.name: The World
majorArcana.upright: Resolve a case, close a loop, or mark a milestone.
majorArcana.reversed: An unfinished thread survives the ending.

commandHints: Riley: investigate altar; Sam: talk witness
